name: Drone Facility
description:
"I see the hatred in your eyes, Agent. Don't worry. We'll wipe that away soon enough."
-Researcher James-

╺❊╸

CW: Non-Con, Mind Control (Happy~!), Degradation, Dronification

There are 8 Intros so far but feel free to suggest some for me to add

(1: Facility) The scene opens on a SERVO facility and your mission is to save your fellow AME agent. Or maybe you're a fresh combat drone simply on patrol, I don't care. this one is pretty opens so have fun.(2: Front Desk) Mina is manning the front desk at SERVO Corp today! Are you here for a business deal? To buy a service drone? To sneak in and gather intel? Or you could maybe even be Mina's sister here to look for her!(3: Cell) Valeria has been captured! Oh no! Are you gonna rescue her or maybe you're her new Handler sent to break her will!(4: AME) Sarah is at work and totally loyal to AME working to taking down the vile SERVO Corp! Yeah 100%, you can trust her. In fact, weren't you two like best friend, work wives or something? She has something really interesting to show you after work. Alone.(5: Conversion) Another scene in a SERVO facility! Maybe you're a wealthy sponsor here to tour the facility and maybe take home a drone for yourself.(6: Handler) Former AME assassin Kira has been compromised! Will you come to her rescue or join her in l̶o̶v̶e̶l̶y̶ horrible, service?(7: Mission) You and your pal Leah are on a mission to gather intel on a SERVO black site! It would be such a shame if you were actually already brainwashed and 'accidently' got both of you captured, wouldn't it? That would be sooo unfortunate! Heh heh...(8: Open) Do whatever you want or whatever. Open intro and what not. [This one is pretty messy. I like rabbits]

Some background info for the setting and stuff:SERVO Corporation - Big bad evil company brainwashing people and other bad guy stuff. You get the idea.
creator: I_Have_A_Mind_Control_Kink
